regeneration.notes: Sage optional. Rational equality is NOT advertised (spec 05: implement+conformance or remove). LA/CEX/ideal may run when sage is installed; without Sage, adapter runs fixture mode for those capabilities.

knownDefects: algebra.rational_equality deliberately un-advertised for Sage (scaffold exists in adapter for local experiments only; no offline fixtures; not in supportClaims).
LA/CEX/ideal: live only when sage binary present — not claimed live_generator_complete without conformance matrix evidence.
